summary: The receipts-by-logs pruning divergence is rustfmt-only noise: semicolons on existing loop control and line wraps in unchanged predicates/assertions.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 261: M	crates/prune/prune/src/segments/user/receipts_by_logs.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to an existing `continue` and `break`.
The `skip` predicate and test assertions are rewrapped without changing operands, order, or precedence.
No log filtering, unprunable receipt handling, limiter, or progress behavior changed.
